description: This file controls additional functionalities and statistics for every monster in the game. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Controls the unique name ID to define the monstats2 entry.

columns.name: Height
columns.description: Determines the height of the monster. This has 2 purposes. The first purpose is to act as an index value for selecting which icebreak missile to use when the monster dies while frozen. The second purpose is to select a code which affects what attack animation the player characters will use when attacking the monster (Attack1 and or Attack2). See each code description types below.

columns.name: OverlayHeight
columns.description: Determines the height value of overlays (See overlay) for the monster

columns.name: pixHeight
columns.description: Determines the pixel height value for the damage bar when the monster is selected

columns.name: SizeX
columns.description: Determines the tile grid size of the monster which is use for handling placement when the monster spawns or uses movement skills

columns.name: SizeY
columns.description: Determines the tile grid size of the monster which is use for handling placement when the monster spawns or uses movement skills

columns.name: spawnCol
columns.description: Controls the method for spawning the monster based on the collisions in the environment

columns.name: MeleeRng
columns.description: Controls the range of the monster's melee attack, which can affect also affect certain AI pathing. If this value equals 255, then refer to the monster's weapon class (.BaseW).

columns.name: BaseW
columns.description: Defines the monster's base weapon class, which can affect how the monster attacks. Uses a enums.EWEAPONCLASS

columns.name: HitClass
columns.description: Defines the specific class of an attack when the monster successfully hits with an attack. This can affect the sound and overlay display of the attack hit. Uses an integer index.

columns.name: HDv
columns.description: Formula fields that define the types of visual graphics to use for the specific component field. Users can add input parameters by adding a comma "," to the input and using a code. Comma "," separated inputs. For a list of possible component inputs, see the compcode file.

columns.description: Formula fields that define the types of visual graphics to use for the specific component field. Users can add input parameters by adding a comma "," to the input and using a code. Comma "," separated inputs. For a list of possible component inputs, see the compcode file.

columns.name: HD
columns.description: Boolean fields, which control which specific component piece is enabled for the monster. If equals 1, then the component is enabled. If equals 0, then the monster does not have that component. Corresponds to the matching .COMPv

columns.name: TR
columns.description: Boolean fields, which control which specific component piece is enabled for the monster. If equals 1, then the component is enabled. If equals 0, then the monster does not have that component. Corresponds to the matching .COMPv

columns.name: TotalPieces
columns.description: Defines the total amount of component pieces that the monster uses. This value should match the number of enabled Boolean fields listed in .COMP.

columns.name: mDT
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Death Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mNU
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Neutral Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mWL
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Walk Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mGH
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Get Hit Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mA1
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Attack 1 Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mA2
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Attack 2 Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mBL
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Block Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mSC
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Cast Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mS1
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mS2
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mS3
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mS4
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mDD
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Dead Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mKB
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Knockback Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mSQ
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Sequence Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: mRN
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Run Mode for the monster. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled.

columns.name: dDT
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Death Mode

columns.name: dNU
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Neutral Mode

columns.name: dWL
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Walk Mode

columns.name: dGH
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Get Hit Mode

columns.name: dA1
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Attack 1 Mode

columns.name: dA2
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Attack 2 Mode

columns.name: dBL
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Block Mode

columns.name: dSC
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Cast Mode

columns.name: dS1
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during the corresponding Skill Mode

columns.name: dS2
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during the corresponding Skill Mode

columns.name: dS3
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during the corresponding Skill Mode

columns.name: dS4
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during the corresponding Skill Mode

columns.name: dDD
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Dead Mode

columns.name: dKB
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Knockback Mode

columns.name: dSQ
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Sequence Mode

columns.name: dRN
columns.description: Defines the number of directions that the monster can face during Run Mode

columns.name: A1mv
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Attack 1 Mode while the monster is moving with the Walk mode or Run mode. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled while the monster is moving.

columns.name: A2mv
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Attack 2 Mode while the monster is moving with the Walk mode or Run mode. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled while the monster is moving.

columns.name: SCmv
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the Cast Mode while the monster is moving with the Walk mode or Run mode. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled while the monster is moving.

columns.name: S1mv
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode while the monster is moving with the Walk mode or Run mode. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled while the monster is moving.

columns.name: S2mv
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode while the monster is moving with the Walk mode or Run mode. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled while the monster is moving.

columns.name: S3mv
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode while the monster is moving with the Walk mode or Run mode. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled while the monster is moving.

columns.name: S4mv
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the corresponding Skill Mode while the monster is moving with the Walk mode or Run mode. If equals 0, then this mode is disabled while the monster is moving.

columns.name: noGfxHitTest
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then enable the mouse selection bounding box functionality around the monster. If equals 0, then the monster cannot be selected by the mouse.

columns.name: htTop
columns.description: Define the pixel top offset around the monster for the mouse selection bounding box functionality. This field relies on the .noGfxHitTest field being enabled.

columns.name: htLeft
columns.description: Define the pixel left offset around the monster for the mouse selection bounding box functionality. This field relies on the .noGfxHitTest field being enabled.

columns.name: htWidth
columns.description: Define the pixel right offset around the monster for the mouse selection bounding box functionality. This field relies on the .noGfxHitTest field being enabled.

columns.name: htHeight
columns.description: Define the pixel bottom offset around the monster for the mouse selection bounding box functionality. This field relies on the .noGfxHitTest field being enabled.

columns.name: restore
columns.description: Determines if the monster should be placed on the inactive list, to be saved when the level unloads. If equals 0, then do not save the monster. If equals 1, then rely on other checks to determine to save the monster. If equals 2, then force save the monster.

columns.name: automapCel
columns.description: Controls what index of the Automap tiles to use to display this monster on the Automap. This field relies on the .noMap field being disabled.

columns.name: noMap
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster will not appear on the Automap. If equals 0, then the monster will normally appear on the Automap.

columns.name: noOvly
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then no looping overlays will be drawn on the monster. If equals 0, then overlays will be drawn on the monster. (See overlay)

columns.name: isSel
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster is selectable and can be targeted. If equals 0, then the monster cannot be selected.

columns.name: alSel
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the player can always select the monster, regardless of being an ally or enemy. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: noSel
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the player can never select the monster. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: shiftSel
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the player can target this monster when holding the Shift key and clicking to use a skill. If equals 0, then the monster cannot be targeted while the player is holding the Shift key.

columns.name: corpseSel
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster's corpse can be with the mouse cursor. If equals 0, then the monster's corpse cannot be selected with the mouse cursor.

columns.name: isAtt
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster can be attacked. If equals 0, then the monster cannot be attacked.

columns.name: revive
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster is allowed to be revived by the Necromancer Revive skill. If equals 0, then the monster cannot be revived by the Necromancer Revive skill.

columns.name: limitCorpses
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster's corpse will be placed into a pool with all other corpses with this field checked. Once that pool reaches the max (50), the corpses at the beginning of the pool start getting removed.

columns.name: critter
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster will be flagged as a critter, which gives some special case handling such as not creating impact sounds and differently handling its spawn placement in presets. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: small
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster will be classified as a small type, which can affect what types of missiles can be used on the monster (Example: Barbarian Grim Ward size) or how the monster is knocked back. If equals 0, then ignore this. If this field is enabled, then the .large field should be disabled, to avoid confusion.

columns.name: large
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster will be classified as a large type, which can affect what types of missiles can be used on the monster (Example: Barbarian Grim Ward size) or how the monster is knocked back. If equals 0, then ignore this. If this field is enabled, then the .small field should be disabled, to avoid confusion.

columns.name: soft
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster's corpse is classified as soft bodied, meaning that its corpse can be used by certain corpse skills such as Barbarian Find Potion, Find Item, or Grim Ward. If equals 0, then the monster's corpse cannot be used for these skills.

columns.name: inert
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster will never attack its enemies. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: objCol
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1 and the monster class is "barricadedoor", "barricadedoor2", or "evilhut", then the monster will place an invisible object with collision. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: deadCol
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster's corpse will have collision with other units. If equals 0, then the monster's corpse will not have collision.

columns.name: unflatDead
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then ignore the corpse draw order for rendering the sprite on top of others, while the monster is dead. If equals 0, then the monster's corpse will have a normal corpse draw order.

columns.name: Shadow
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster will project a shadow on the ground. If equals 0, then the monster will not project a shadow.

columns.name: noUniqueShift
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1 and the monster is a Unique monster, then the monster will not have random color palette transform shifts. If equals 0, then the non-Unique monster will have random color palette transform shifts.

columns.name: compositeDeath
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the monster's Death Mode and Dead mode will make use of its component system. If equals 0, then the monster will default to using the Hand-To-Hand weapon class and no component system.

columns.name: localBlood
columns.description: Controls the color of the monster's blood based on the region locale. If equals 0, then do not change the blood to green and keep it red. If equals 1, then change the monster's special components to use the green blood locale. If equals 2, then change the blood to green.

columns.name: Bleed
columns.description: Controls if the monster will create blood missiles. If equals 0, then the monster will never bleed. If equals 1, then the monster will randomly create the "blood1" or "blood2" missiles when hit. If equals 2, then the monster will randomly create the "blood1", "blood2", "bigblood1", or "bigblood2" missiles when hit.

columns.name: Light
columns.description: Controls the monster's minimum Light Radius size (measured in grid sub-tiles)

columns.name: light-r
columns.description: Controls the red color value of the monster's Light Radius (Uses a value from 0 to 255)

columns.name: light-g
columns.description: Controls the green color value of the monster's Light Radius (Uses a value from 0 to 255)

columns.name: light-b
columns.description: Controls the blue color value of the monster's Light Radius (Uses a value from 0 to 255)

columns.name: Utrans
columns.description: Modifies the color palette transform for the monster respectively in Normal, Nightmare, and Hell difficulty.

columns.name: Utrans(N)
columns.description: Modifies the color palette transform for the monster respectively in Normal, Nightmare, and Hell difficulty.

columns.name: Utrans(H)
columns.description: Modifies the color palette transform for the monster respectively in Normal, Nightmare, and Hell difficulty.

columns.name: InfernoLen
columns.description: The frame length to hold the channel cast time of the inferno skill. This is used for when the monster has the "inferno" state, or for Diablo when he is using the "DiabLight" skill.

columns.name: InfernoAnim
columns.description: The exact frame in the channel animation to loop back and start at again

columns.name: InfernoRollback
columns.description: The exact frame in the channel animation to determine when to roll back to the .InfernoAnim frame

columns.name: ResurrectMode
columns.description: Controls which monster mode to set on the monster when it is resurrected. Uses a MonMode.code

columns.name: ResurrectSkill
columns.description: Controls what skill should the monster use when it is resurrected.

columns.name: SpawnUniqueMod
columns.description: Controls what unique modifier the monster should always spawn with.
